requirement_topic.en: OCPP Interoperability and EMC Requirements under IEC 61000
requirement_topic.zh: OCPP互操作与IEC 61000电磁兼容要求
requirement_topic.zht: OCPP互操作與IEC 61000電磁兼容要求

summary.en: Network-connected EV chargers deployed in Singapore under LTA's EV Common Charger Grant programme and by charge-point operators are expected to support OCPP (Open Charge Point Protocol) for back-office communication, remote monitoring, fault reporting, access control, and load management. OCPP compliance enables integration with Singapore's EV roaming and payment infrastructure. EMC performance for EV chargers in Singapore must comply with IEC 61000 series limits applicable to electrical equipment on the Singapore 230/400 V 50 Hz grid. Conducted and radiated emissions, immunity to voltage dips, and harmonic current injection limits under IEC 61000-3-2 and IEC 61000-3-3 are relevant. Enterprise Singapore may reference IEC 61000 series in CPSR conformity requirements for consumer-facing EV charging equipment.
summary.zh: 在陆路交通管理局（LTA）电动汽车公共充电桩资助计划及充电点运营商框架下在新加坡部署的联网电动汽车充电桩，须支持OCPP（开放充电点协议）用于后台通信、远程监控、故障报告、访问控制及负载管理。OCPP合规性有助于与新加坡电动汽车漫游及支付基础设施集成。新加坡电动汽车充电桩的电磁兼容性能须符合适用于新加坡230/400 V、50 Hz电网电气设备的IEC 61000系列限值。IEC 61000-3-2及IEC 61000-3-3下的传导和辐射发射、电压跌落抗扰及谐波电流注入限值均为相关要求。企业发展局在面向消费者的电动汽车充电设备的消费品安全要求（CPSR）合格评定中，可能引用IEC 61000系列。
summary.zht: 在陸路交通管理局（LTA）電動汽車公共充電樁資助計劃及充電點運營商框架下在新加坡部署的聯網電動汽車充電樁，須支持OCPP（開放充電點協議）用於後台通訊、遠程監控、故障報告、訪問控制及負載管理。OCPP合規性有助於與新加坡電動汽車漫遊及支付基礎設施集成。新加坡電動汽車充電樁的電磁兼容性能須符合適用於新加坡230/400 V、50 Hz電網電氣設備的IEC 61000系列限值。IEC 61000-3-2及IEC 61000-3-3下的傳導和輻射發射、電壓跌落抗擾及諧波電流注入限值均為相關要求。企業發展局在面向消費者的電動汽車充電設備的消費品安全要求（CPSR）合格評定中，可能引用IEC 61000系列。

standards_or_laws: OCPP (Open Charge Point Protocol) — back-office communication for networked chargers
IEC 61000-3-2 — Electromagnetic compatibility — Limits for harmonic current emissions
IEC 61000-3-3 — Electromagnetic compatibility — Limitation of voltage changes, voltage fluctuations and flicker
IEC 61000-4 series — Electromagnetic compatibility — Testing and measurement techniques (immunity)
LTA EV Common Charger Grant technical specifications (lta.gov.sg)
Enterprise Singapore CPSR — Consumer Protection (Safety Requirements) for electrical equipment

summary.en: China DC fast chargers commonly use the GB/T 27930-2023 communication protocol between the off-board charger and the battery management system, which is a CAN bus protocol and is not interoperable with OCPP back-office systems or the CCS2 / IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118 communication stack. China domestic EMC testing follows GB/T standards aligned to CISPR and IEC 61000 series, but test reports issued against Chinese national standards may not satisfy Singapore CPSR or LTA grant EMC evidence requirements without reference to the specific IEC editions accepted in Singapore.
summary.zh: 中国直流快充通常采用GB/T 27930-2023通信协议（非车载充电机与电池管理系统之间的CAN总线协议），该协议与OCPP后台系统或CCS2 / IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118通信栈不兼容。中国国内电磁兼容测试遵循与CISPR及IEC 61000系列一致的GB/T标准，但依据中国国家标准出具的测试报告，在未参照新加坡认可的具体IEC版本的情况下，可能无法满足新加坡CPSR或LTA资助电磁兼容证据要求。
summary.zht: 中國直流快充通常採用GB/T 27930-2023通訊協議（非車載充電機與電池管理系統之間的CAN總線協議），該協議與OCPP後台系統或CCS2 / IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118通訊棧不兼容。中國國內電磁兼容測試遵循與CISPR及IEC 61000系列一致的GB/T標準，但依據中國國家標準出具的測試報告，在未參照新加坡認可的具體IEC版本的情況下，可能無法滿足新加坡CPSR或LTA資助電磁兼容證據要求。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 27930-2023 — Communication protocols between off-board conductive charger and battery management system
GB/T 17625.1 (aligned to IEC 61000-3-2) — Limits for harmonic current emissions
GB/T 17625.2 (aligned to IEC 61000-3-3) — Limitation of voltage fluctuations and flicker

gap.en: Exporters must confirm: (1) the charger firmware supports the OCPP version required by the LTA grant programme and intended charge-point operator; (2) back-office API integration and site testing are completed before site activation; (3) GB/T 27930 DC communication is replaced with the IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118 stack for CCS2 DC stations; (4) EMC test reports reference IEC 61000 series editions accepted in Singapore and are issued by an accredited laboratory; (5) harmonic current injection and voltage-fluctuation performance comply with IEC 61000-3-2 and IEC 61000-3-3 on Singapore's 230/400 V 50 Hz grid. A charger with only GB/T 27930 DC communication and no OCPP back-office implementation cannot be integrated into Singapore's networked charging infrastructure.
gap.zh: 出口商须确认：(1) 充电桩固件支持LTA资助计划和目标充电点运营商所要求的OCPP版本；(2) 在站点激活前完成后台API集成和现场测试；(3) CCS2直流充电站将GB/T 27930直流通信替换为IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118通信栈；(4) 电磁兼容测试报告引用新加坡认可的IEC 61000系列版本，并由认可实验室出具；(5) 谐波电流注入和电压波动性能在新加坡230/400 V、50 Hz电网下符合IEC 61000-3-2及IEC 61000-3-3要求。仅支持GB/T 27930直流通信且无OCPP后台实现的充电桩无法接入新加坡联网充电基础设施。
gap.zht: 出口商須確認：(1) 充電樁固件支持LTA資助計劃和目標充電點運營商所要求的OCPP版本；(2) 在站點激活前完成後台API集成和現場測試；(3) CCS2直流充電站將GB/T 27930直流通訊替換為IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118通訊棧；(4) 電磁兼容測試報告引用新加坡認可的IEC 61000系列版本，並由認可實驗室出具；(5) 諧波電流注入和電壓波動性能在新加坡230/400 V、50 Hz電網下符合IEC 61000-3-2及IEC 61000-3-3要求。僅支持GB/T 27930直流通訊且無OCPP後台實現的充電樁無法接入新加坡聯網充電基礎設施。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for networked chargers under LTA EV Common Charger Grant programme; IEC 61000 EMC compliance required for grid-connected electrical equipment in Singapore; OCPP integration expected by charge-point operators
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 27930 is mandatory for China domestic DC charging communication; it is not OCPP-compatible and cannot substitute for Singapore network integration; GB/T EMC standards may not align to Singapore-accepted IEC 61000 editions without further evidence

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] OCPP back-office capability is expected for networked EV chargers in Singapore's LTA programme. Chargers with only GB/T 27930 DC communication cannot be integrated without firmware and communication-stack redesign. Confirm IEC 61000 EMC evidence editions with the Singapore conformity route before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在新加坡LTA计划的联网电动汽车充电桩中，OCPP后台能力为预期必要条件。仅支持GB/T 27930直流通信的充电桩在不进行固件和通信栈重新设计的情况下，无法完成集成。在出货前，应向新加坡合格评定路径确认IEC 61000电磁兼容证据所引用的版本。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在新加坡LTA計劃的聯網電動汽車充電樁中，OCPP後台能力為預期必要條件。僅支持GB/T 27930直流通訊的充電樁在不進行固件和通訊棧重新設計的情況下，無法完成集成。在出貨前，應向新加坡合格評定路徑確認IEC 61000電磁兼容證據所引用的版本。
